CRC32 checksum calculation and MX25U flash memory driver with initialization and data functions.


## Files
- **[flash_crc.c](flash_crc.c.md)**: Calculates a CRC32 checksum for data in flash memory using a specified chunk size.
- **[mx25u.c](mx25u.c.md)**: Driver for MX25U flash memory, including initialization, register read/write, and data read functions.
